lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: I am looking for health insurance. I just started a new job, but it does not offer benefits yet.
lines.cn: 我想买健康保险。我刚找到新工作，但暂时还没有福利。

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: I understand. We have several individual plans. Do you need coverage for just yourself or your family too?
lines.cn: 我理解。我们有几种个人保险计划。你需要只保你自己，还是也包括家人？

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: Just myself for now. My wife has insurance through her job. What are the monthly premiums?
lines.cn: 目前就我自己。我妻子通过她工作有保险。月保费是多少？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: For a basic plan, it is about two hundred dollars a month. It covers doctor visits and emergency care. A better plan is three hundred and fifty.
lines.cn: 基础计划大约每月200美元。涵盖门诊和急救。更好的计划是350美元。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: What is the difference between the two? Is the better plan worth the extra cost?
lines.cn: 两者有什么区别？更好的计划值这个额外的费用吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: The better plan covers prescription drugs and has a lower deductible. If you take regular medicine, it saves money.
lines.cn: 更好的计划涵盖处方药，自付额更低。如果你经常吃药，这样更省钱。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: I do not take regular medicine, so the basic plan might be enough. What about dental?
lines.cn: 我不经常吃药，所以基础计划可能就够了。那牙齿保险呢？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Dental insurance is usually separate. We can bundle it with your health plan for an extra twenty-five dollars a month.
lines.cn: 牙齿保险通常是分开的。我们可以把它和健康计划捆绑，每月额外25美元。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: Let me think about the dental part. Can I sign up for the basic health plan today?
lines.cn: 牙齿部分让我考虑一下。我今天可以签基础健康计划吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Yes, we can start the application now. Coverage will begin on the first of next month.
lines.cn: 可以，我们现在就可以开始申请。保险下个月一号生效。
